basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (ICAR-NBPGR)
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources (ICAR-NBPGR) Recruitment 2026: ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 2 Young Professional - I posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/female candidates, up to 10 years for Differently Abled candidates and 3 years for OBC (non-creamy layer), as per the Govt. of India/ICAR Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Science/Commerce/Computers from any recognized University with minimum 60% marks.
qualification.details: Young Professional - I: Graduate in Science/Commerce/Computers from any recognized University with minimum 60% marks. Desirable: Practical knowledge and experience of IT application, virtual meeting platforms and computer skills (MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint etc.).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-NBPGR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional - I posts at ICAR-NBPGR is scheduled for 18th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional - I post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Young Professional - I position at ICAR-National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional - I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Science, Commerce, or Computers from a recognized university with a minimum of 60% marks to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional - I post is between 21 years and 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ICAR-NBPGR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional - I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates if any, category certificate if applicable), and a filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation provided?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: 5 years for SC/ST/female candidates, up to 10 years for Differently Abled candidates, and 3 years for OBC (non-creamy layer).

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the project for which these positions are being hired?
faq.answer: The project duration is up to 30th September 2026.
